description.zh-Hans: 使用SDF类元球渲染生成程序化史莱姆/有机粘液纹理，通过噪波扭曲半径和高光实现湿润效果。输出史莱姆图像和覆盖遮罩。
description.en: Generates procedural slime/organic blob textures using SDF metaball-like rendering with noise-distorted radii and specular highlights for a wet look. Outputs both the slime image and a coverage mask.

triggers.zh-Hans: 史莱姆, 黏液, 有机体, 粘液怪, 软泥, 液体生物
triggers.en: slime, goo, ooze, blob, organic liquid, creature

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成程序化史莱姆/有机粘液纹理，用于怪物或奇幻环境的生物材质。
exampleUsage.en: Generate procedural slime or organic blob textures for creatures or fantasy environment biomes.
